(Self-Correction: Ensure "monitor" appears twice, once before and once after "improve").<channel|>Wearable fitness trackers provide individuals with constant, actionable data, allowing them to effectively **monitor** key physiological metrics such as heart rate, sleep patterns, caloric expenditure, and steps taken. This granular insight enables users to make informed behavioral adjustments, helping them proactively **improve** aspects of their well-being, whether by increasing physical activity or optimizing rest. Furthermore, the continuous ability to **monitor** these changes over time allows individuals to track long-term progress and ensure their health goals remain on track.<turn|>
